newsSinceJun6: No company-specific catalyst found. The +13.8% move on June 9 (intraday ~147,400 KRW) extends a sector-wide rotation rally into Korean front-end chip-equipment names that began around June 4, as buying momentum rotated out of Samsung/SK hynix into deposition/etch/clean equipment makers on HBM, next-gen DRAM and higher-stack NAND capex expectations. No new order disclosure or earnings event on DART. Context: KRX designated the stock an 'investment warning' issue on May 11, 2026, flagging speculative overheating.

sources.label: Seoul Economic Daily - Chip equipment stocks surge as Samsung, SK hynix take a breather (Jun 4, 2026)
Daum Finance disclosure - investment warning stock designation (May 11, 2026)

verdicts.rankRationale: On a wafer-fab-equipment alpha list, a +13.8% single-day spike on rotational flow with zero new orders or guidance, stacked on +72% YTD and a May KRX investment-warning designation, consumes residual alpha rather than confirming the thesis; yesterday's hold is overridden by today's price action, not by news.
verdicts.bull: Eugene Tech's LPCVD/ALD and selective-epi tools are genuinely levered to the HBM4, next-gen DRAM and high-stack NAND capex cycle, and Korean chipmakers' 2026 equipment outlays are set to outpace Taiwan; orders could still validate the rerating.
verdicts.neutral: The bottleneck thesis is intact but increasingly priced: the market is front-running deposition/etch/clean earnings improvement before order disclosures arrive, so the stock marks time until DART order filings or Q2 results confirm.
verdicts.bear: A flow-driven melt-up in a $2B KOSDAQ name already flagged as an investment-warning stock unwinds fast if Samsung/SK hynix capex timing slips or the rotation reverses; export-control and order-timing risk in the original thesis remain unresolved.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: DART order-win disclosures from Samsung/SK hynix tied to HBM4 and next-gen DRAM front-end capacity additions
verdicts.primaryRisk: Reversal of the speculative equipment-sector rotation; the stock gives back the June spike with no fundamental floor established at the new price
